name: Middle Eastern Carrot Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the grated carrots, lemon juice, vegetable oil, ground coriander, salt, chopped mint, chopped parsley, and sugar or maple syrup.
2. Stir until all ingredients are well combined.
3. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least one hour before serving to allow flavors to meld.
